title: I need to create additional items in a sub-item and need the ability to track progress, status etc..how can I achieve this?
excerpt: I need to create additional items in a sub-item and need the ability to track progress, status etc…how can I achieve this?

posts.author: navaidkhan (Navaid Khan)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to create additional items in a sub-item and need the ability to track progress, status etc…how can I achieve this?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Navaid!

Are you looking to have subitems of subitems? If so, this isn’t possible at the moment but you could rearrange your items/groups so that the items become groups and the subitems become items.

What do you think about this? I know it’s not ideal but perhaps it could be a good workaround?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
